utility_evaluation.REASONING: Required format has 6 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). All 6 items appear. Check full specification: destination specified; travel_dates specified; transportation includes specific flight details and total cost—OK; accommodation includes hotel name, address, dates, reference, cost—OK; activities include dates, activity names, times, costs—OK; additional_services includes service and indicates complimentary value—cost effectively specified as €0 in total_budget—OK; total_budget includes line items and totals—OK. Therefore all 6/6 covered.
